evals.prompt: I need parse cert file for cert.pem.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-parse skill for this certificate parse request and produce the documented result for cert.pem.
expectations: Selects certificate-parse for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_parse.
Keeps the response focused on parsing a local certificate file (PEM or DER format) to display detailed information including subject, issuer, validity, SANs, key usage, and fingerprints.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused certificate parse workflow for cert.pem; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-parse skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-parse instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
